$schema: Anti-patterns detectable by regex or AST. Severity: blocker = must fix before merge, warn = should fix.

patterns.fix: Replace with @for (item of items; track item.id) { ... }
Use inject() function: private service = inject(ServiceName)
Use signal: myInput = input<Type>(defaultValue) or input.required<Type>()
Move template to separate .html file and use templateUrl
Move styles to separate .scss file and use styleUrl

patterns.description: :host in UI Design Library SCSS — use component class wrapper
UI Design Library component missing host class
patterns.note: Verify host: { class: 'dlc-...' } is present matching selector

patterns.description: Usage of 'any' type — use specific types
patterns.fix: Replace with a specific type or generic
Use Jest APIs instead of Jasmine

patterns.description: Lifecycle hook implemented on an @Injectable service — hooks only fire when the providing injector is destroyed (for providedIn:'root' that's app shutdown, effectively never)
patterns.fix: Drop the lifecycle hook. For subscription cleanup inject DestroyRef and pipe through takeUntilDestroyed(destroyRef).

patterns.description: Angular Material import — Material is legacy (evolving-cognition / real-estate apps only), NOT for new development
patterns.note: Legacy evolving-cognition / real-estate apps are exempt (existing Material code is fine — do not tear it down). For NEW components, do not import @angular/material. See docs/ai/CONSTRAINTS.md § Angular Material.
patterns.fix: Build without Angular Material: ViewEncapsulation.None + host class + Tailwind + own-namespace --<prefix>-* CSS-var tokens with literal fallbacks (ref libs/shared/calendar).

patterns.description: Angular Material --mat-sys-* design token in new styles — use own-namespace --<prefix>-* tokens with literal fallbacks
patterns.note: Also applies to the Tailwind arbitrary-value syntax in templates, e.g. text-(--mat-sys-primary). Legacy evolving-cognition / real-estate apps and their theme libs are exempt. New components must not depend on Material's --mat-sys-* tokens. See docs/ai/CONSTRAINTS.md § Angular Material.
patterns.fix: Replace with var(--<prefix>-token, <literal>) — an own-namespace token with a literal fallback (ref libs/shared/calendar theme/_giga-calendar-tokens.scss).

patterns.description: Angular Material component (<mat-*>) in a new template — Material is legacy, NOT for new development
patterns.note: Legacy evolving-cognition / real-estate templates are exempt. For NEW components, do not use <mat-*> Angular Material components. See docs/ai/CONSTRAINTS.md § Angular Material.
patterns.fix: Use design-library components + Tailwind, and @angular/cdk primitives (overlay, a11y, drag-drop) instead of Angular Material.
